data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story DD Coverage
This task satisfies: DD1 (update-artifacts.sh produces FILE_IMPACT events), DD2 (unparseable logged/skipped), DD3 (idempotent via stamp), DD5 (unit tests pass)

## TDD Requirement
Task 361a-6c26 (RED tests) must pass RED before this task begins.

## File Impact
- CREATE: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh

## Implementation
Follow ticket-migrate-brainstorm-tags.sh pattern: bash outer + Python3 inline heredoc.
Stamp: target/.claude/.file-impact-migration-v1 (JSON with version, migrated_at, tickets_processed, tickets_skipped).
Idempotent: if stamp exists, exit 0 immediately.
Event timestamp: use ticket CREATE event timestamp (not wall-clock), so latest-wins backfill semantics work correctly.
FILE_IMPACT event format: {event_type, timestamp, uuid, env_id: 00000000-0000-4000-8000-migration001, data: {file_impact: [{path, reason},...]}}.
Malformed tickets (section found but 0 paths extracted): log ticket ID to stderr, skip, do not crash.
chmod +x required.

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus
On 3 consecutive opus failures: escalate to user

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh
- [ ] All 3 RED tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh 2>&1 | grep "^PASSED:" | grep -q .
- [ ] Idempotency: exits 0 with stamp present
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh --help 2>&1 | head -1 || true
data.title: Implement ticket-migrate-file-impact-v1.sh migration script
